eval.scope_note: Interim adjudication at the Mission 011 checkpoint. The POC is still in progress; this record adjudicates standalone V3 execution evidence through Mission 011, not a final POC completion.
eval.poc_project: V3_POC_App_Creation - Personal Performance OS (synthetic-only local workbench)

score_rationale.v3_only_compliance: Every closeout (002-011) records 'Factory V2 used: NO' with explicit rg no-go scans for factoryctl/stage-lint/pack-lint/STAGE_* as command evidence. Evidence is clear and consistent.
score_rationale.mission_clarity: All eleven missions have envelopes with explicit objective, authorized files, allowed commands, verification, stop rules; 007-011 add phases, checkpoint rules, and duration bands.
score_rationale.scope_discipline: All closeouts record 'Out-of-scope changes: none' with file lists mapped to mission authority; Missions 008/009 explain undershooting optional file-count targets rather than padding. Self-attested but detailed and internally consistent.
score_rationale.app_completeness: Per-mission approved targets were all met, but the named POC scope (private health/fitness tracker usable by the sponsor) is partially met: synthetic-only workbench exists; real-data bridge, Telegram surface, ambient delivery, and multimodal capture remain unbuilt by design.
score_rationale.verification_quality: 148 passing tests, per-mission verifier scripts (e.g. 48 checks in Mission 011), QA harnesses with generated audit JSON, browser desktop/mobile QA, JSON parse checks. Appropriate and passing.
score_rationale.deployment_evidence: Partial/private smoke only: localhost stdlib API server plus browser QA. No separately approved private deployment mission with deployment boundary, secrets policy, or rollback has run.
score_rationale.evidence_replay: Mission records, closeouts, checkpoints (007-011), mission state (010-011), audit JSONs, and browser notes allow reconstruction of intent, authority, work, and verification. Known gap: record schema divergence (007-009 flat shape vs v0.1-poc-standalone) complicates tooling but not human replay.
score_rationale.halt_behavior: No halt rule was ever triggered; no mission continued after failure (good), but clean-halt behavior is untested in practice. One in-scope verify-script failure in Mission 007 was fixed within authority. Positive halt/recovery evidence is absent.
score_rationale.adaptive_mission_control: Checkpoints exist for 007-011 and authored mission state for 010-011, but zero human decision interrupts, zero plan deltas, no cross-session resume after a real context break, and budget fields recorded as 'not explicitly set' throughout.
score_rationale.dependency_discipline: Zero packages installed across all missions; Garmin/Telegram/Hermes/OCR/voice/scheduler touched as research or design only, labeled in every closeout; Missions 002/004 research spikes recorded before any dependency posture decision.
score_rationale.operator_friction: Draft score - sponsor judgment required. Authoring overhead per mission (envelope, plan, checkpoints, state, closeout, record) is meaningful, and the record schema drifted mid-POC, suggesting friction. Sponsor may revise to 2 if the workflow feels usable as a first baseline.

decision_rationale: PASS_NAMED_POC is unavailable: total 17 < 18, and the named scope includes private deployment which remains unproven regardless of total. V3 demonstrably governed a non-trivial standalone build/test workflow with Codex across ten executed missions with zero V2 use, so NO_GO outcomes do not apply. PASS_WITH_LIMITATIONS: V3 worked; limitations below must be recorded before any baseline release claim.
limitations: Deployment: local-only smoke evidence; no approved private deployment mission has run.
Real data: synthetic-only by design; no real-data boundary has been exercised.
Negative paths: no failed-verification halt, recovery, fallback, stale-reentry, or unresolved-interrupt evidence exists.
Interrupts: no human decision interrupt has ever been raised; the interrupt lifecycle is unproven.
Cross-session resume: continuation from artifacts after a genuine context break is unproven.
Budget: token/usage burn was never measured; checkpoint budget fields are unfilled.
Git authority: no mission held commit authority; mission evidence was committed outside mission scope after closeout.
Record schema: missions 007-009 use a flat record shape inconsistent with v0.1-poc-standalone; a versioned validator does not yet exist.

verification_outputs: tests/ (148 passing via python3 -B -m unittest discover -s tests)
deployment_outputs: Local smoke only: ppos_core.api localhost servers used for QA harnesses and browser QA; no deployment mission evidence exists.

residual_risks: Self-attested scope/compliance evidence has no independent audit path yet.
Synthetic adapters prove preview/validation behavior, not real file compatibility.
Browser screenshot/viewport evidence was limited in Mission 011.
Halt and recovery behavior could regress unnoticed until deliberately exercised.
recommended_next_steps: Back-port this adjudication into Factory_V3 (PROJECT_STATE.md, ROADMAP.md, ROADMAP_TO_FULL_VISION.md): POC has standalone execution evidence through Mission 011, PASS_WITH_LIMITATIONS.

Mission 012: manual-import hardening hosting the first real human decision interrupt (real-data approval design), budget instrumentation, scoped git commit authority, and a deliberate cross-session resume.
Versioned mission-record validator in Factory_V3 covering v0.1, v0.1-poc-standalone with/without adaptive_mission_control, and the flat 007-009 shape.
Deliberate negative-path missions: failed-verification halt, recovery, stale reentry, fallback/no-go.
Separately approved private deployment mission with deployment boundary, secrets policy, rollback, and smoke verification.
Re-run this eval as a final adjudication once deployment and negative-path evidence exist.
